title: Multiply Using the Distributive Property
essential_question: How does the Distributive Property help you multiply?

pretest.question: Which shows the Distributive Property for 6 × 14?

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is A. Work through it step by step.

pretest.question: Use distributive: 7 × 23 = 7×20 + 7×3 = 140 + ___
hints: Think about what distributive property multiply means.
Try drawing an array or using place value.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 21. Multiply place by place.

hints: Think about what distributive property multiply means.
Try drawing an array or using place value.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 40. Multiply place by place.

pretest.question: The Distributive Property breaks one factor into a sum.

feedback.incorrect: The answer is True.

pretest.question: 9 × 47 using distributive is:
choices: D) Both A and C give same answer

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is D. Both evaluate to 423.

learn.title: What is Distributive?
learn.content: The Distributive Property says you can break one factor into a sum, multiply each part, then add. a × (b + c) = a × b + a × c.
learn.tts: The Distributive Property says you can break one factor into a sum, multiply each part, then add. a × (b + c) = a × b + a × c.

learn.title: Why It Works
learn.content: If you have 6 groups of 14 objects, that's the same as 6 groups of 10 plus 6 groups of 4.
learn.tts: If you have 6 groups of 14 objects, that's the same as 6 groups of 10 plus 6 groups of 4.

learn.title: Work with Harder Facts
learn.content: When you don't know 6×8 quickly, break: 6×(5+3)=30+18=48.
learn.tts: When you don't know 6×8 quickly, break: 6×(5+3)=30+18=48.

learn.title: Practice Mental Math
learn.content: Distributive lets you multiply mentally by making friendly numbers first.
learn.tts: Distributive lets you multiply mentally by making friendly numbers first.
